nasb.text: “Now behold, he has a son who has observed all his father’s sins which he committed, and observing does not do likewise.

esv.text: “Now suppose this man fathers a son who sees all the sins that his father has done; he sees, and does not do likewise:

cnv.text: “他若生一個兒子，這兒子看見他父親所犯的一切罪，他雖然看見了，卻不照樣去作：

ccb.text: “倘若这不肖子有一个好儿子，他看见父亲的所作所为，不愿步父亲的后尘。
